$note: Eli Protocol playbook (eli_protocol.md). JSON to keep the loader stdlib-only. Every playbook carries all four phases (prevent/detect/respond/recover).

detect.signal: secret-scanning rule over the repo / pre-commit hook

respond: audit where the credential was used (data fetcher: access logs for that identity)
if the secret reached a remote, treat as compromise and expand scope

harden.change: move the secret to an environment variable / vault; never commit it
keep the secret-scanning rule as a standing pre-commit + CI check

recover: confirm the old credential is revoked and the new one is in the vault
confirm no service still references the old value
